SapModel.File.NewBlank.parameter_notes: No parameters. Call InitializeNewModel() before this.
SapModel.File.NewBlank.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). No ByRef outputs.

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.description: Define or modify a material by name and type
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatType: int (1=Steel, 2=Concrete, 3=NoDesign, 4=Aluminum, 5=ColdFormed, 6=Rebar, 7=Tendon); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMaterial.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). No ByRef outputs. Minimum required: Name, MatType.

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.description: Set isotropic mechanical properties (E, Poisson, thermal coeff)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); E: float (modulus of elasticity [F/L^2]); U: float (Poisson ratio); A: float (thermal expansion coeff [1/T]); Temp: float (default=0)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetMPIsotropic.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial. Returns ret_code (0=success).

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.description: Set weight per unit volume and mass per unit volume
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); MyType: int (1=weight per unit volume [F/L^3], 2=mass per unit volume [M/L^3]); Value: float; Temp: float (default=0)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetWeightAndMass.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial. Returns ret_code (0=success). Call twice — once for weight (MyType=1) and once for mass (MyType=2).

SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str (existing material); T3: float (depth/height [L]); T2: float (width [L]); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetRectangle.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for concrete beams and columns.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.description: Define a solid circular frame section
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str (existing material); T3: float (diameter [L]); Color: int (-1=default); Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetCircle.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for piles, drilled shafts, and circular columns.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, TF, TW, T2B, TFB, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str; T3: float (overall depth); T2: float (top flange width); TF: float (top flange thickness); TW: float (web thickness); T2B: float (bottom flange width); TFB: float (bottom flange thickness); Color: int; Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetISection.notes: Supports asymmetric I-sections (different top/bottom flanges). For symmetric use equal T2=T2B and TF=TFB.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.description: Define a rectangular tube (HSS) frame section
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.signature: (Name, MatProp, T3, T2, TF, TW, Color, Notes, GUID) → ret_code
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.parameter_notes: Name: str; MatProp: str; T3: float (outer depth [L]); T2: float (outer width [L]); TF: float (flange/top+bottom wall thickness [L]); TW: float (web/left+right wall thickness [L]); Color: int; Notes: str; GUID: str
SapModel.PropFrame.SetTube.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Common for HSS braces, columns, and truss elements.

SapModel.PointObj.AddCartesian.description: Create a point object at Cartesian coordinates

SapModel.FrameObj.AddByPoint.description: Create a frame element between two existing points

SapModel.FrameObj.AddByCoord.description: Add a frame element defined by endpoint coordinates

SapModel.FrameObj.SetSection.description: Assign or change the section property of a frame element

SapModel.PropArea.SetShell_1.description: Define una propiedad de área tipo shell. ShellType: 1=thin, 2=thick, 3=plate-thin, 4=plate-thick, 5=membrane, 6=layered. Retorna ret_code (0=OK).

SapModel.AreaObj.AddByCoord.description: Crea un objeto de área (shell) definiendo sus vértices por coordenadas. Acepta triángulos (3 pts) o quads (4 pts). Retorna [Name_out, ret_code].

SapModel.AreaObj.SetSpring.description: Assign area springs (Winkler foundation) to an area element

SapModel.LoadPatterns.Add.description: Add a new load pattern to the model
SapModel.LoadPatterns.Add.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). No ByRef outputs. signature: (Name, MyType, SelfWTMultiplier, AddCase) → ret_code

SapModel.Func.FuncRS.SetUser.description: Define a user-defined response spectrum function from period-value pairs
SapModel.Func.FuncRS.SetUser.notes: Returns ByRef outputs (Period[], Value[], ret_code) — extract last element as ret_code. DampRatio=0.05 for 5% damping.

SapModel.LoadCases.ResponseSpectrum.SetL.description: Assign directional response spectrum loads to a spectrum load case
SapModel.LoadCases.ResponseSpectrum.SetL.notes: Returns ByRef outputs (LoadName[], Func[], SF[], CSys[], Ang[], ret_code) — extract last element as ret_code. Prerequisites: RS function and RS load case must exist.

SapModel.RespCombo.Add.description: Create a new response combination (linear, envelope, SRSS, etc.)

SapModel.RespCombo.SetCaseList.description: Add a load case to a response combination with scale factor

SapModel.RespCombo.GetCaseList.description: Query the load cases and scale factors in a combination

SapModel.EditArea.Divide.description: Divide an area object into a mesh of smaller areas

SapModel.SelectObj.CoordinateRange.description: Select objects within a coordinate bounding box

SapModel.ConstraintDef.SetBody.description: Define a body constraint (rigid link) for DOF coupling

SapModel.FrameObj.SetTCLimits.description: Set tension/compression force limits for a frame element

SapModel.PointObj.SetRestraint.description: Assign translational and rotational restraints to a joint

SapModel.FrameObj.SetLoadDistributed.description: Assign distributed loads (force/moment per unit length) to frame objects

SapModel.PointObj.SetLoadForce.description: Assign point load forces and moments to point objects

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAllTables.description: Returns all tables with import type and empty status
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAllTables.notes: ByRef outputs: raw[0]=NumberTables, raw[1]=TableKey[], raw[2]=TableName[], raw[3]=ImportType[] (0=not importable,1=non-interactive,2=interactive unlocked,3=interactive any), raw[4]=IsEmpty[], raw[-1]=ret_code

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAvailableTabl.description: Returns available (non-empty) tables with their import type — lighter query than GetAllTables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAvailableTabl.notes: ByRef outputs: raw[0]=NumberTables, raw[1]=TableKey[], raw[2]=TableName[], raw[3]=ImportType[], raw[-1]=ret_code. Returns only non-empty tables (subset of GetAllTables).

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAllFieldsInTa.description: Returns all fields (columns) metadata for a specific table
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetAllFieldsInTa.notes: Input: TableKey (str). ByRef outputs: raw[0]=TableVersion, raw[1]=NumberFields, raw[2]=FieldKey[], raw[3]=FieldName[], raw[4]=Description[], raw[5]=UnitsString[], raw[6]=IsImportable[], raw[-1]=ret_code

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetObsoleteTable.description: Returns list of obsolete table keys and associated version notes
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetObsoleteTable.notes: ByRef outputs: raw[0]=NumberTableKeys, raw[1]=TableKeyList[], raw[2]=NotesList[], raw[-1]=ret_code. Count may be 0 if no obsolete tables.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.description: Read a table as flat array for interactive editing. Returns TableVersion, FieldKeysIncluded[], NumberRecords, TableData[] (flat row-by-row).
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.notes: raw[0]=TableVersion, raw[1]=FieldKeysIncluded[], raw[2]=NumberRecords, raw[3]=TableData[], raw[-1]=ret_code. Always cancel with CancelTableEditing() after use if not applying changes.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.CancelTableEditi.description: Cancel all pending table edits without applying them. Acts as a rollback of SetTableForEditing* calls.
SapModel.DatabaseTables.CancelTableEditi.notes: Returns ret_code directly (int, 0=success). No ByRef outputs. ApplyEditedTables returns ret_code=1 after a cancel when nothing remains staged — do not assert on that.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.description: Write edited table data (flat array) back for import via ApplyEditedTables. COM echoes back TableVersion, FieldKeysIncluded[], TableData[].
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.notes: raw is a list: raw[-1]=ret_code (0=success). Use isinstance(raw, (tuple, list)) check since COM returns a list, not a tuple. Always follow with CancelTableEditing() or ApplyEditedTables().

SapModel.DatabaseTables.ApplyEditedTable.description: Apply all pending table edits to the model. Returns NumFatalErrors, NumErrorMsgs, NumWarnMsgs, NumInfoMsgs, ImportLog.
SapModel.DatabaseTables.ApplyEditedTable.notes: raw[0]=NumFatalErrors, raw[1]=NumErrorMsgs, raw[2]=NumWarnMsgs, raw[3]=NumInfoMsgs, raw[4]=ImportLog, raw[-1]=ret_code. Returns ret_code=1 when there is nothing staged to apply.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.description: Read table data for display (read-only) as flat array. Allows specifying subset of fields via FieldKeyList.
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.notes: raw[0]=FieldKeyList (echoed input), raw[1]=TableVersion, raw[2]=FieldKeysIncluded[], raw[3]=NumberRecords, raw[4]=TableData[], raw[-1]=ret_code. Note offset vs GetTableForEditingArray due to echoed FieldKeyList at raw[0].

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.description: Export table display data to a CSV file
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.notes: Returns (table_version, ret_code). Use [\"\"] for all fields. CSV file written to csvFilePath.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.description: Export table display data as a CSV string
Export table display data as an XML string
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForDispl.notes: Returns (FieldKeysIncluded[], NumberRecords, xmlString, ret_code). raw[2]=xmlString. Set IncludeSchema=True for full XML schema.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.description: Export editable table data to a CSV file
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.notes: Returns (table_version, ret_code). Call CancelTableEditing after use if not applying. Stages table for editing.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.description: Export editable table data as a CSV string
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableForEditi.notes: Returns (table_version, csvString, ret_code). raw[1]=csvString. Call CancelTableEditing after use if not applying.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.description: Import table data from a CSV file for editing
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.notes: Returns (table_version, ret_code). Export CSV first via GetTableForEditingCSVFile, then re-import. Follow with ApplyEditedTables or CancelTableEditing.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.description: Import table data from a CSV string for editing
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableForEditi.notes: Returns (table_version, csvString, ret_code). raw[-1]=ret_code. Follow with ApplyEditedTables or CancelTableEditing.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadCasesSele.description: Returns the load cases currently selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadCasesSele.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadCasesSele.description: Sets the load cases selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadCasesSele.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int ret_code — use ret[-1] if isinstance(ret, (tuple, list)) else ret. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadCombinati.description: Returns the load combinations currently selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadCombinati.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadCombinati.description: Sets the load combinations selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadCombinati.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadPatternsS.description: Returns the load patterns currently selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetLoadPatternsS.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadPatternsS.description: Sets the load patterns selected for display in database tables
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetLoadPatternsS.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetElementVirtua.description: Returns the element virtual work named sets currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetElementVirtua.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetElementVirtua.description: Sets the element virtual work named sets selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetElementVirtua.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetGeneralizedDi.description: Returns the generalized displacements currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetGeneralizedDi.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetGeneralizedDi.description: Sets the generalized displacements selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetGeneralizedDi.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetJointResponse.description: Returns the joint response spectra named sets currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetJointResponse.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetJointResponse.description: Sets the joint response spectra named sets selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetJointResponse.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetPlotFunctionT.description: Returns the plot function traces named sets currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetPlotFunctionT.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetPlotFunctionT.description: Sets the plot function traces named sets selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetPlotFunctionT.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetPushoverNamed.description: Returns the pushover named sets currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetPushoverNamed.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetPushoverNamed.description: Sets the pushover named sets selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetPushoverNamed.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetSectionCutsSe.description: Returns the section cuts currently selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetSectionCutsSe.notes: Returns (NumberSelected, NameList[], ret_code). Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetSectionCutsSe.description: Sets the section cuts selected for display
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetSectionCutsSe.notes: Takes NameList[]. Returns list/int — use isinstance check. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableOutputOp.description: Returns table output display options (18 ByRef params: BaseReaction coords, mode ranges, history options)
SapModel.DatabaseTables.GetTableOutputOp.notes: 18 input params (ByRef). Returns tuple with all option values + ret_code last. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableOutputOp.description: Sets table output display options (18 params: BaseReaction coords, mode ranges, history options)
SapModel.DatabaseTables.SetTableOutputOp.notes: 18 positional args. Returns int or (int,) — use: ret if isinstance(ret, int) else ret[-1]. Part of consolidated Display Selection wrapper.

SapModel.DatabaseTables.ShowTablesInExce.description: Export specified tables directly to Excel. Excel must be installed. Returns 0 on success.

SapModel.FrameObj.GetLoadDistributed.description: Retrieve distributed load assignments from frame objects

SapModel.FrameObj.SetLoadPoint.description: Assign point loads (force/moment) to frame objects at specified distance

SapModel.AreaObj.SetLoadUniform.description: Assign uniform distributed loads [F/L²] to area objects

SapModel.Results.BaseReact.description: Extract total base reactions (forces and moments at reporting point)

SapModel.AreaObj.SetLoadGravity.description: Assign gravity load multipliers to area objects

SapModel.FrameObj.SetReleases.description: Assign end releases (hinges/partial fixity) to frame objects

SapModel.FrameObj.GetReleases.description: Retrieve end release and partial fixity assignments from frame objects

SapModel.FrameObj.SetInsertionPoint_1.description: Assign cardinal point and joint offsets to frame objects

SapModel.FrameObj.SetLocalAxes.description: Assign local axis rotation angle to frame objects

SapModel.GroupDef.SetGroup.description: Create or modify a group definition with properties

SapModel.GroupDef.GetNameList.description: Retrieve names of all defined groups

SapModel.FrameObj.SetGroupAssign.description: Add or remove frame objects from a group

SapModel.AreaObj.SetGroupAssign.description: Add or remove area objects from a group

SapModel.ConstraintDef.GetDiaphragm.description: Retrieve diaphragm constraint definition (axis and coordinate system)

SapModel.Results.AreaStressShell.description: Extract shell element stresses (S11, S22, S12 at top/bottom, principal, Von Mises)

SapModel.Results.ModalPeriod.description: Extract modal periods, frequencies, circular frequencies, and eigenvalues

SapModel.Results.ModalParticipatingMassR.description: Extract modal participating mass ratios (individual and cumulative per DOF)

SapModel.Results.ModeShape.description: Extract modal displacements (mode shapes) at point elements

SapModel.Analyze.SetActiveDOF.description: Set active/inactive global degrees of freedom for analysis model
SapModel.Analyze.SetActiveDOF.notes: SetActiveDOF echoes back the DOF array as ByRef output. Use raw[-1] for ret_code, not the raw return value directly.

SapModel.Analyze.GetActiveDOF.description: Retrieve active global degrees of freedom for analysis model
SapModel.Analyze.GetActiveDOF.notes: Returns [DOF[], ret_code]. Default state for new model is all 6 DOFs = True.

SapModel.Analyze.GetCaseStatus.description: Retrieve run status for all load cases (1=Not run, 4=Finished)
SapModel.Analyze.GetCaseStatus.notes: Status values: 1=Not run, 2=Could not start, 3=Not finished, 4=Finished. MODAL cases return 2 (Could not start) when no mass is defined.

SapModel.File.OpenFile.description: Open an existing SAP2000 model file (.sdb)

SapModel.PropLink.SetLinear.description: Define a linear-type link property (stiffness, damping, DOFs)

SapModel.LinkObj.AddByPoint.description: Create a two-joint link element between two existing point objects.
SapModel.LinkObj.AddByPoint.parameter_notes: Order: Point1(str), Point2(str), Name(ByRef str, pass ""), IsSingleJoint(bool, False=2-joint), PropName(str), UserName(str). Returns [Name_assigned, ret_code]. NO CSys parameter.

SapModel.LinkObj.AddByCoord.description: Create a link element by specifying I-End and J-End coordinates

SapModel.AreaObj.SetProperty.description: Assign or change area section property on an area object

SapModel.PropArea.GetShell_1.description: Retrieve shell-type area section properties (type, material, thicknesses)

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOSteel_1.description: Set steel design properties (yield/ultimate strengths, stress-strain model)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOSteel_1.signature: (Name, Fy, Fu, EFy, EFu, SSType, SSHysType, StrainAtHardening, StrainAtMaxStress, StrainAtRupture, FinalSlope) -> ret_code
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOSteel_1.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing steel material); Fy/Fu: float [F/L^2]; EFy/EFu: expected strengths; SSType: 0=User,1=Parametric-Simple; SSHysType: 0=Elastic,1=Kinematic,2=Takeda,3=Pivot; strains: float; FinalSlope: float (negative for softening)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOSteel_1.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial with MatType=1. Returns ret_code directly (0=success).

SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOConcrete_1.description: Set concrete design properties (fc, lightweight flag, stress-strain model)
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOConcrete_1.signature: (Name, fc, IsLightweight, FcsFactor, SSType, SSHysType, StrainAtfc, StrainUltimate, FinalSlope, FrictionAngle, DilatationalAngle) -> ret_code
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOConcrete_1.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing concrete material); fc: float [F/L^2]; IsLightweight: bool; FcsFactor: float; SSType: 0=User,1=Parametric-Simple; SSHysType: int; StrainAtfc/StrainUltimate: float; FinalSlope: float (negative); FrictionAngle/DilatationalAngle: float [deg]
SapModel.PropMaterial.SetOConcrete_1.notes: Prerequisites: material must exist via SetMaterial with MatType=2. Returns ret_code directly (0=success).

SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMaterial.description: Get material type and metadata (MatType, Color, Notes, GUID) for an existing material
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMaterial.signature: (Name, MatType, Color, Notes, GUID) -> [MatType, Color, Notes, GUID, ret_code]
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMaterial.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); all other params are ByRef outputs. MatType: 1=Steel, 2=Concrete, 3=NoDesign, 4=Aluminum
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMaterial.notes: ByRef layout: [MatType, Color, Notes, GUID, ret_code]. Pass placeholder values (0, 0, '', '') for ByRef params.

SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMPIsotropic.description: Retrieve isotropic mechanical properties (E, Poisson ratio, thermal expansion coefficient)
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMPIsotropic.signature: (Name, E, U, A, Temp) -> [E, poisson, thermal, tempDep, ret_code]
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMPIsotropic.parameter_notes: Name: str (existing material); E/U/A/Temp are ByRef outputs. Pass placeholder values (0, 0, 0, 0).
SapModel.PropMaterial.GetMPIsotropic.notes: ByRef layout: [E, poisson, thermal, tempDep, ret_code]. Prerequisites: material must have SetMPIsotropic called first.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetAngle.parameter_notes: Name: str — section name; MatProp: str — material name; T3: float — vertical leg depth [L]; T2: float — horizontal leg width [L]; TF: float — flange thickness [L]; TW: float — web thickness [L]; Color: int — -1=default; Notes: str — ""; GUID: str — ""
SapModel.PropFrame.SetAngle.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Use GetNameList to verify creation.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetChannel.parameter_notes: Name: str — section name; MatProp: str — material name; T3: float — overall depth [L]; T2: float — flange width [L]; TF: float — flange thickness [L]; TW: float — web thickness [L]; Color: int — -1=default; Notes: str — ""; GUID: str — ""
SapModel.PropFrame.SetChannel.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Use GetNameList to verify creation.

SapModel.PropFrame.SetPipe.description: Define a circular pipe (hollow) frame section
SapModel.PropFrame.SetPipe.parameter_notes: Name: str — section name; MatProp: str — material name; T3: float — outer diameter [L]; TW: float — wall thickness [L]
SapModel.PropFrame.SetPipe.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Color/Notes/GUID are optional.

SapModel.PropFrame.GetRectangle.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing section name; all others are ByRef outputs: FileName, MatProp, T3 (depth), T2 (width), Color, Notes, GUID
SapModel.PropFrame.GetRectangle.notes: ByRef output: [FileName, MatProp, T3, T2, Color, Notes, GUID, ret_code]. Pass "" for all ByRef args.

SapModel.PropFrame.GetCircle.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing section name; ByRef outputs: FileName, MatProp, T3 (diameter), Color, Notes, GUID
SapModel.PropFrame.GetCircle.notes: ByRef output: [FileName, MatProp, T3, Color, Notes, GUID, ret_code]. Pass "" for all ByRef args.

SapModel.PropFrame.GetISection.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing section name; ByRef outputs: FileName, MatProp, T3 (depth), T2 (top flange width), TF (top flange thickness), TW (web thickness), T2B (bottom flange width), TFB (bottom flange thickness), Color, Notes, GUID
SapModel.PropFrame.GetISection.notes: ByRef output: [FileName, MatProp, T3, T2, TF, TW, T2B, TFB, Color, Notes, GUID, ret_code]. Pass "" or 0 for all ByRef args.

SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboStrength.description: Select/deselect a combo for steel strength design
SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboStrength.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing load combination name; Selected: bool — True=select, False=deselect
SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboStrength.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Combo must be created via RespCombo.Add first.

SapModel.DesignSteel.GetComboStrength.description: Retrieve combos selected for steel strength design
SapModel.DesignSteel.GetComboStrength.parameter_notes: NumberItems: int — (ByRef out) count of selected combos; MyName: str[] — (ByRef out) combo names
SapModel.DesignSteel.GetComboStrength.notes: ByRef output: [NumberItems, MyName[], ret_code]. Use SetComboStrength to select combos first.

SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboDeflection.description: Select/deselect a combo for steel deflection design (serviceability)
SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboDeflection.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing load combination name; Selected: bool — True=select, False=deselect
SapModel.DesignSteel.SetComboDeflection.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Combo must be created via RespCombo.Add first.

SapModel.DesignSteel.GetCode.parameter_notes: CodeName: str — (ByRef out) current steel design code name
SapModel.DesignSteel.GetCode.notes: ByRef output: [CodeName, ret_code]. Use after SetCode to verify.

SapModel.DesignSteel.SetCode.parameter_notes: CodeName: str — steel design code name (e.g. "AISC 360-10")
SapModel.DesignSteel.SetCode.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Valid codes: AISC 360-10, AISC-LRFD93, AISC-ASD89, EN 1993-1-1:2005, etc. Verify with GetCode after setting.

SapModel.DesignSteel.DeleteResults.description: Delete all steel frame design results
SapModel.DesignSteel.DeleteResults.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Call before re-running design with updated parameters.

SapModel.DesignConcrete.SetComboStrength.description: Select/deselect a combo for concrete strength design
SapModel.DesignConcrete.SetComboStrength.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing load combination name; Selected: bool — True=select, False=deselect
SapModel.DesignConcrete.SetComboStrength.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Analogous to DesignSteel.SetComboStrength.

SapModel.DesignConcrete.GetCode.parameter_notes: CodeName: str — (ByRef out) current concrete design code name
SapModel.DesignConcrete.GetCode.notes: ByRef output: [CodeName, ret_code]. Use after SetCode to verify.

SapModel.DesignConcrete.SetCode.parameter_notes: CodeName: str — concrete design code name (e.g. "ACI 318-14")
SapModel.DesignConcrete.SetCode.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Valid codes: ACI 318-14, ACI 318-11, EN 2-2004, CSA A23.3-14, etc. Verify with GetCode after setting.

SapModel.RespCombo.Delete.parameter_notes: Name: str — name of existing load combination to delete
SapModel.RespCombo.Delete.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Verify deletion with GetNameList.

SapModel.RespCombo.ChangeName.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing combo name; NewName: str — new unique name
SapModel.RespCombo.ChangeName.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). New name must not conflict with existing combo or case names.

SapModel.RespCombo.Count.description: Get total number of load combinations
SapModel.RespCombo.Count.notes: Returns count directly as integer. Blank model returns 0.

SapModel.RespCombo.SetTypeOAPI.description: Set the type of a load combination
SapModel.RespCombo.SetTypeOAPI.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing combo name; ComboType: int — 0=LinearAdd, 1=Envelope, 2=AbsoluteAdd, 3=SRSS, 4=RangeAdd

SapModel.RespCombo.GetTypeOAPI.description: Get the type of a load combination

SapModel.RespCombo.DeleteCase.description: Remove a load case or combo from a combination
SapModel.RespCombo.DeleteCase.parameter_notes: Name: str — combo name; CType: int — 0=LoadCase, 1=LoadCombo; CName: str — name of case/combo to remove
SapModel.RespCombo.DeleteCase.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). The case must have been previously added via SetCaseList.

SapModel.RespCombo.AddDesignDefaultCombo.description: Add default design combinations by material type
SapModel.RespCombo.AddDesignDefaultCombo.parameter_notes: DesignSteel: bool; DesignConcrete: bool; DesignAluminum: bool; DesignColdFormed: bool
SapModel.RespCombo.AddDesignDefaultCombo.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). SAP2000 v26+: function succeeds (ret=0) but may generate 0 combos on blank models — behavior change vs. older API docs (v11-v15). Combos are generated when model has appropriate load patterns and structural members.

SapModel.LoadCases.ResponseSpectrum.SetD.description: Set constant damping for a response spectrum case
SapModel.LoadCases.ResponseSpectrum.SetD.parameter_notes: Name: str — RS load case name; Damp: float — modal damping ratio (e.g. 0.05 = 5%)
SapModel.LoadCases.ResponseSpectrum.SetD.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Requires RS case created via SetCase first.

SapModel.LoadCases.Count.description: Get total number of load cases (optionally by type)
SapModel.LoadCases.Count.parameter_notes: CaseType: int — optional eLoadCaseType filter (omit for all types); 1=LinearStatic, 2=NonlinearStatic, 3=Modal, 4=ResponseSpectrum
SapModel.LoadCases.Count.notes: Returns count directly as integer. Blank model has at least 1 case (DEAD).

SapModel.LoadCases.Delete.parameter_notes: Name: str — name of existing load case to delete
SapModel.LoadCases.Delete.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Adding a load pattern auto-creates a load case of the same name.

SapModel.LoadCases.ChangeName.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing load case name; NewName: str — new unique name
SapModel.LoadCases.ChangeName.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Verify with GetNameList after renaming.

SapModel.LoadPatterns.Count.description: Get total number of load patterns
SapModel.LoadPatterns.Count.notes: Returns count directly as integer. Blank model has at least 1 pattern (DEAD).

SapModel.LoadPatterns.Delete.parameter_notes: Name: str — name of existing load pattern to delete
SapModel.LoadPatterns.Delete.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Cannot delete the last remaining load pattern. IMPORTANT: must delete the auto-created load case (LoadCases.Delete) before deleting the pattern, otherwise returns ret=1.

SapModel.LoadPatterns.ChangeName.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing load pattern name; NewName: str — new unique name
SapModel.LoadPatterns.ChangeName.notes: Returns ret_code directly (0=success). Verify with GetNameList after renaming.

SapModel.SourceMass.SetMassSource.description: Add or reinitialize a mass source definition specifying which elements and load patterns contribute to model mass. Essential for seismic and modal analysis workflows.
SapModel.SourceMass.SetMassSource.parameter_notes: Name: str, MassFromElements: bool, MassFromMasses: bool, MassFromLoads: bool, IsDefault: bool, NumberLoads: int, LoadPat: str[], SF: float[]
SapModel.SourceMass.SetMassSource.notes: Returns [LoadPat[], SF[], ret_code] — ByRef echo. Use raw[-1] for return code. Verified 2026-03-28.

SapModel.SourceMass.Count.description: Get total number of mass sources defined in the model. Returns integer directly (not ByRef).
SapModel.SourceMass.Count.notes: Returns integer directly. Blank model has 1 default mass source ('MSSSRC1'). Verified 2026-03-28.

SapModel.SourceMass.GetMassSource.description: Retrieve mass source configuration including element/load contributions and scale factors. Returns ByRef layout with all settings.
SapModel.SourceMass.GetMassSource.parameter_notes: Name: str — Existing mass source name. Pass dummy values for ByRef outputs.
SapModel.SourceMass.GetMassSource.notes: ByRef layout: [MassFromElements, MassFromMasses, MassFromLoads, IsDefault, NumberLoads, LoadPat(), SF(), ret_code]. Verified 2026-03-28.

SapModel.SourceMass.GetDefault.description: Retrieve the name of the default mass source currently set in the model.
SapModel.SourceMass.GetDefault.parameter_notes: Pass empty string '' as placeholder for ByRef Name output.
SapModel.SourceMass.GetDefault.notes: ByRef layout: [Name, ret_code]. Default mass source is 'MSSSRC1' in blank models. Verified 2026-03-28.

SapModel.FrameObj.SetModifiers.description: Set stiffness modification factors for a frame object (cracked section analysis)
SapModel.FrameObj.SetModifiers.parameter_notes: Name: str — frame object name; Value: float[8] — [Area, AS2, AS3, Torsion, I22, I33, Mass, Weight]
SapModel.FrameObj.SetModifiers.notes: Returns [Value[8], ret_code] — ByRef pattern. Use raw[-1] for ret_code. Common ACI 318 values: beams I22=I33=0.35, columns I22=I33=0.70.

SapModel.FrameObj.GetModifiers.description: Retrieve stiffness modification factors for a frame object
SapModel.FrameObj.GetModifiers.parameter_notes: Name: str — frame object name; Value: float[8] — placeholder [0.0]*8 required. Returns [Value[8], ret_code].
SapModel.FrameObj.GetModifiers.notes: Pass [0.0]*8 as placeholder for ByRef Value parameter. Returns [Value[8], ret_code].

SapModel.PropArea.SetModifiers.description: Set stiffness modification factors for an area property (shell/slab/wall)
SapModel.PropArea.SetModifiers.parameter_notes: Name: str — area section name; Value: float[10] — [f11, f22, f12, m11, m22, m12, v13, v23, mass, weight]
SapModel.PropArea.SetModifiers.notes: Returns [Value[10], ret_code] — ByRef pattern. Use raw[-1] for ret_code. Array: [f11, f22, f12, m11, m22, m12, v13, v23, mass, weight].

SapModel.PropArea.GetModifiers.description: Retrieve stiffness modification factors for an area property
SapModel.PropArea.GetModifiers.parameter_notes: Name: str — area section name; Value: float[10] — placeholder [0.0]*10 required. Returns [Value[10], ret_code].
SapModel.PropArea.GetModifiers.notes: Pass [0.0]*10 as placeholder for ByRef Value parameter. Returns [Value[10], ret_code].

SapModel.PropFrame.ChangeName.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing section name; NewName: str — new section name
SapModel.PropFrame.ChangeName.notes: Direct return code (not ByRef). Old name must exist. New name must be unique.

SapModel.PropFrame.Count.description: Get total number of frame section properties (optionally filtered by type)
SapModel.PropFrame.Count.parameter_notes: PropType: int (optional) — 0=All section types. Returns integer count directly.
SapModel.PropFrame.Count.notes: Direct integer return (not a list). No arguments required for all types. PropType arg: 0=All, 1=ISection, 2=Channel, 3=Tee, 4=Angle, 6=Box, 7=Pipe, 8=Rect, 9=Circle.

SapModel.PropFrame.Delete.description: Delete a frame section property (must not be in use by any element)
SapModel.PropFrame.Delete.parameter_notes: Name: str — name of the frame section to delete
SapModel.PropFrame.Delete.notes: Direct return code. Fails if section is assigned to any frame object.

SapModel.PropMaterial.ChangeName.parameter_notes: Name: str — existing material name; NewName: str — new material name
SapModel.PropMaterial.ChangeName.notes: Direct return code. Old name must exist. New name must be unique.

SapModel.PropMaterial.Count.description: Get total number of material properties (optionally filtered by material type)
SapModel.PropMaterial.Count.parameter_notes: MatType: int (optional) — 0=All material types. Returns integer count directly.
SapModel.PropMaterial.Count.notes: Direct integer return (not a list). MatType arg: 0=All, 1=Steel, 2=Concrete, 3=Aluminum, 4=ColdFormed, 5=Rebar, 6=Tendon, 7=Other.

SapModel.PropMaterial.Delete.description: Delete a material property (must not be in use by any section)
SapModel.PropMaterial.Delete.parameter_notes: Name: str — name of the material to delete
SapModel.PropMaterial.Delete.notes: Direct return code. Fails if material is used by any frame or area section.

SapModel.PropLink.SetGap.description: Define a Gap-type nonlinear link property (compression-only). DOF arrays size 6.
SapModel.PropLink.SetGap.parameter_notes: Order: Name, DOF[6], Fixed[6], NonLinear[6], Ke[6], Ce[6], k[6], dis[6], dj2, dj3. Returns Long (0=OK). NonLinear MUST come before Ke/Ce.
